name: Personal Features
description: Installs the owner's personal dev container tooling (currently Claude Code, Anthropic's CLI) for use inside a VS Code dev container, wraps the `claude` command so it auto-connects to the IDE, and persists Claude's and the gh CLI's auth/config across container rebuilds and across projects.

cliTools.description: Install language-agnostic productivity/navigation CLIs (ripgrep, fd, fzf, bat, jq, yq, eza, zoxide, tldr).

gitHooks.description: Enforce Conventional Commits and (if secretsScanning is enabled) secret scanning machine-wide via a global git core.hooksPath, regardless of whether the repo being committed to has any hook config of its own.

secretsScanning.description: Install gitleaks for secret scanning, used manually and (if gitHooks is enabled) by the global pre-commit hook.

shellEnhancements.description: Install the Starship prompt and shell aliases for the new CLIs, and persist shell history across rebuilds/projects via a mounted volume.
